commands.repair_reason: Protected maintainer/member PR should stay open for normal maintainer review and landing; no automated cleanup or repair is appropriate.; Cleared: The diff touches pairing metadata but keeps the relaxation scoped to official mobile client IDs and preserves device-family/non-mobile approval checks; no supply-chain changes were found. (sha=6b99ac6cfc7ff0969cb5de6d04ef69cfc5fb096a)
commands.review_summary:
This PR lets official mobile clients refresh same-family OS-version platform labels without metadata-upgrade approval, persists the refreshed platform label, adds focused regression coverage, and handles iOS dashboard deep links.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main flags any non-equal pinned mobile platform string as a platformMismatch unless it is a legacy node-host alias, so an iOS version drift reaches metadata-upgrade approval handling. I did not run a live iOS reconnect reproduction.
commands.review_followup: Protected maintainer/member PR should stay open for normal maintainer review and landing; no automated cleanup or repair is appropriate.
